title: ‘It’s total devastation’: inside the Amazonian war against illegal gold mining
description: The Guardian goes on the ground with Brazilian forces fighting to eradicate mining that has destroyed protected areas of Indigenous land
content:
The jerry-built bordello at the foot of Vila Cururu, an illegal gold-mining settlement at the heart of Brazil’s most desecrated Indigenous territory, was a hive of depravity until just a few weeks ago.

title: Andy Burnham’s first Labour cabinet: who’s in and who’s out?
description: From the Treasury to the Home Office, we look at who will head up key departments in new PM’s government
content:
John Healey
Chancellor
The former defence secretary who quit the government over a lack of funding for the defence investment plan is the surprise appointment to the Treasury.

title: Canadian wildfires rage as Trump warns Carney again over 'poisoning' US air
description: The US president raised the issue with the the Canadian prime minister while the pair attended the World Cup Final in New Jersey.
content:
US President Donald Trump told Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney during the World Cup Final on Sunday to get control of wildfires burning across Canada whose smoke has been "poisoning our air" in the US.
"If we can help them, we'll help them. But m... [2470 chars]

title: Man, 28, charged with murder of former MP Ann Widdecombe
description: Joshua Kerry from Rotherham charged over killing of politician whose body was found at her Devon home
content:
A 28-year-old man from Rotherham has been charged with the murder of the former MP and Reform UK party spokesperson Ann Widdecombe.
Joshua Kerry was charged with Widdecombe’s murder and will appear at Westminster magistrates court on Tuesday, the Cro... [1552 chars]

title: Mammalian meat allergy: The allergy that can make daily activities deadly
description: Mammalian meat allergy is a growing problem along Australia's east coast - and it's caused by tick bites.
content:
When Myfanwy Webb looks back at her birthday party five years ago, she is overcome with regret - remembering what she now sees as a missed opportunity to save her son's life.
